speaker: speaker1
text: How silly of you to jump out of the window !

speaker: speaker2
text: But that was the first thing that came into my mind when I heard the shout earthquake !

speaker: speaker1
text: Why not use staircases ? The terror was not so violent at that time .

speaker: speaker1
text: Maybe the situation is too urgent .

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes , I think I should have jumped in any case .
